Quinn and Vince rush to the scene only to discover that people who you love and hold dearest to your heart, can make it stop beating.

programme.title: Atlanta Homicide
programme.desc: Ayesha Turner lived a quiet life in southwest, Atlanta. One evening, that all changed. A few days go by and Quinn and Vince are notified of a missing person’s report. They begin their case of trying to figure out what happen to Ayesha Turner.

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: As a man leaves to get dinner for his family on a normal October night, he is struck down in a hail of bullets. As investigators delve into the man’s connections, they find that revenge can sometimes make a victim of the wrong person.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.desc: Columbus, Ohio is often described as a big city with a small-town personality. The community is left reeling when a hard-working local teenager is gunned down, and his own twin brother is arrested for the crime.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: When a young college student vanishes near campus, police move quickly to locate her. As the mystery unfolds reinforcements are called in, and through a myriad of suspects, investigators finally uncover the truth – but will a jury agree?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: After a young woman is found dead on the side of a Nashville highway, questions swirl about who could have killed her. Was it an angry ex, her boyfriend’s jealous side piece, or was greed the motive? An unexpected source will reveal the truth.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: When a hardworking immigrant is found dead beside two empty pill bottles and a handwritten note, it seems like an open and shut suicide case. But after talking with those closest to her, detectives realize that nothing about this case is that simple.

programme.desc: The story of a young couple who are madly in love are willing to do what it takes to achieve their goal of wealth and success. Even if it means committing murder to get it.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: When a young woman begins a family with the man of her dreams, everything seems perfect. But after an argument with a neighbor goes too far and threatens her new family, she�ll be faced with protecting her man or risking everything she holds dear.

programme.desc: A well-known Hollywood actress is suddenly tormented by a stalker. Her sister and high school boyfriend try to figure out who is tormenting her.

programme.desc: When interior decorator Zuri Maxwell meets handsome benefactor and entrepreneur Godfrey Anderson, she compromises the values and morals that should guide her in an effort to be part of the moneyed world she so desperately wants to enter.

programme.title: Sins of the City

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe

programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power

programme.desc: On this week's Leaders With Francine Lacqua, she speaks with tennis legend Rafael Nadal about the mindset that fueled his extraordinary career. programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast

Henry also explains why, after two unsuccessful bids for Anglo American, discipline matters more than dealmaking.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade

programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa. Linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping the decisions of traders across the Middle East, Africa and beyond.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Kriti Gupta.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Based in London, Francine Lacqua speaks with high-profile guests in the heart of global business, economics, finance and politics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern have the economy and global markets "under surveillance"; their daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond cover the latest in business, investment, and geopolitics; no other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets
programme.desc: The most important global business and breaking markets news and information as it happens.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Close
programme.desc: Alix Steel, Romaine Bostick and Scarlet Fu own the market-moving breaking news around the closing bell; a synthesis of the top stories; key insights from investors, strategists and the companies of today and tomorrow.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Nuclear power is attempting a comeback, but producing the necessary fuel is complex. From mining to enrichment, can new technologies and supply chains scale to power the next generation of reactors?

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bloomberg The Asia Trade - bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers.

programme.title: La esclava Isaura
programme.desc: Una historia que se desenvuelve a mediados del siglo XIX en Brasil y relata la vida de Isaura, una esclava mestiza, hija de la esclava del Comendador y el capataz de la hacienda.

programme.title: Génesis
programme.desc: Adaptación de uno de los libros más reconocidos de la Biblia, que aborda la historia del origen de la humanidad, invitando a entender el presente, volviendo al principio de todo. La caída de Lucifer, la vida de Adán y Eva, Noé y el diluvio, y otros.

programme.title: Señora del Destino
programme.desc: María do Carmo es una madre de cinco hijos que triunfó en la vida con mucha lucha y tesón, pero que todavía tendrá una batalla que luchar: obtener el cariño de su hija quien fue secuestrada cuando era una recién nacida.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Los hermanos Mahinur y Metin sueñan con rehacer su vida al lado de Öyku y Cuneyt. Defne escucha una conversación entre su padre y Busra. Defne se desmaya.

programme.title: Moisés y los diez mandamientos
programme.desc: La historia de Moisés desde su nacimiento y llegada a manos de la princesa Henutmire hasta llevar a su pueblo a la Tierra Prometida. Su crianza como un verdadero príncipe egipcio junto a su tío Ramsés.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Lucas no puede controlar su impulso y viaja a Marruecos, dispuesto a recuperar a Jade. Leonardo enfurece al ver que se caen los negocios con los árabes. Marisa se desahoga con Said.

programme.title: Eres mi estrella

programme.title: Destinos cruzados

programme.title: Eat Play Stay
programme.desc: A classic mountain showdown has this hopping ski town divided. But everyone agrees that no matter which mountain reigns supreme, this four-season hot spot offers great food, bucolic retreats, and a whole new view on the great outdoors.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen
programme.desc: Years ago Chef Bergen Carmen from Meril and Chef Aaron Villeda from Bao Mi worked side-by-side; now they’re back getting their hands dirty for some friendly competition. Will his old pal chicken liver turn out to be Chef Villeda’s ultimate downfall?

programme.title: What's On The Menu?
programme.desc: What's On The Menu?

programme.title: Wait, What Happened?
programme.desc: In this game show, comedian Frank Nicotero hits the streets to ask people questions inspired by the wildest news stories for a chance at winning a cash prize. These real-life stories with unreal outcomes will make you say, “Wait, What Happened?"

programme.title: Maker Nation Challenge
programme.desc: Makers, crafters and artists square off to create the most iconic art piece that best represents their city. From glass-blowers and chalk artists to metalsmiths and tattooers, see who Host Ashley Adams and the judges will crown the victor.

programme.title: My Amazing Cheap Date
programme.desc: Host and comedic actor Amy Brassette McKeon challenges two sets of couples to pass a good time on a dime in their city. Find out which couple will experience the most amazing date for under fifty bucks.

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness
programme.desc: Join New Hampshire-based band Recycled Percussion as they perform acts of kindness in their community, and across the country. In each episode, you'll witness the great lengths and hilarious things they're willing to do in the name of kindness.

programme.title: Stitch
programme.desc: Stitch showcases the feel-good and do-good that make up the fabric of America from inspiring tales of perseverance, to good Samaritans helping neighbors, to trailblazers improving their communities.

programme.title: LIVE: KCCI 8 News
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the KCCI 8 News Team.

programme.title: This is Iowa
programme.desc: Building our future is the theme of this episode of This is Iowa. See an Iowa woman’s surprising connection to her kidney donor, and how a community helped a family expand their home as they transform from a family of four to a family of seven. Plus, the classroom where personalized teddy bears are helping give first graders the confidence to learn. And finally, Steve Karlin’s last report on a trolley expert reminiscing on the nostalgia of Des Moines’ streetcars.

programme.title: Flood of '93: 30 Years Later
